# pi-over-sqrt-10-
$$
\frac{\pi } 2=5\arcsin (\frac 1{\sqrt{(10)}})-\arcsin (\frac 3{\sqrt{(6250)}})
$$

$$
\frac{\pi } 2=\sum
_{n=0}^{\infty }\frac{(\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{0}{2n}n)}{4^n\ast (2n+1)}\ast [\frac
5{\sqrt{(10^{(2n+1)})}}-\frac{3^{(2n+1)}}{\sqrt{(6250^{(2n+1)})}}]
$$

$$
\frac{\pi } 2=\frac 1{\sqrt{6250}}\ast \sum
_{n=0}^{\infty }\frac{(\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{0}{2n}n)\ast (5\ast 25^{(2n+1)}-3^{(2n+1)})}{25000^n\ast
(2n+1)}
$$

$$
{\pi =\frac{\sqrt{(10)}}{125}\ast \sum _{n=0}^{\infty }\frac{(\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{0}{2n}n)\ast
(5^{(4n+3)}-3^{(2n+1)})}{25000^n\ast (2n+1)}}
$$

$$
{\pi =\frac{\sqrt{(10)}}{125}\ast \sum _{n=0}^{\infty
}\frac{(\genfrac{}{}{0pt}{0}{2n}n)\ast (125\ast 50^{(2n)}-3\ast 6^{(2n)})}{10^{(5n)}\ast (2n+1)}}
$$
